response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior individual contributor with broad full-stack experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling at Naver), but the role requires an executive-level CTO with 5+ years of senior technical leadership, proven scaling of engineering orgs from 10 to 30+, production multi-agent AI systems at scale, and fintech-infrastructure depth. The resume shows no executive leadership, no team-scaling track record, no production multi-agent system ownership, and only tangential fintech exposure. The gap between IC-track experience and the CTO mandate is too large to bridge through an interview.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering career across backend, distributed systems, and high-throughput services (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Recent hands-on exposure to agentic AI tooling and MCP frameworks at Naver
Founder of an open-source platform showing initiative, architecture ownership, and community engagement
concerns: No executive or senior technical leadership experience — entire career is IC/staff-level, no evidence of scaling teams from 10 to 30+
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems ownership in regulated or high-stakes commercial settings
Minimal fintech-infrastructure depth — no credit risk, working-capital, liquidity, or regulated-finance architecture experience

key_factors.factor: Missing executive leadership and team-scaling track record
No production multi-agent AI systems experience
